purpose: Declare which report markdown files are current public-review candidates and which are superseded/internal drafts for Sprint 30.3 grounding checks.

reports.title: Plan van aanpak AZWA Almere v3
reports.notes: Current cautious concept version; should avoid internal datalayer terms and unsupported concrete capacity, budget or planning claims.

reports.title: Bestuurlijke planning AZWA 2026 voor Almere
reports.notes: Current planning concept; internal planning boundaries must remain explicitly non-formal and for review.

reports.title: Plan van aanpak AZWA Almere v1
reports.notes: Older concept retained for traceability; use v3 for public-review style.

reports.title: Plan van aanpak AZWA Almere v2
reports.notes: Superseded draft with known internal datalayer language, exact FTEs, invented appendices and self-chosen planning examples. Retained only as a cautionary reference.

reports.title: Schrijfrichtlijn Plan van Aanpak
reports.notes: Guideline for writing and checking report text; not itself a public-facing report.
